In connection with this, and taking into account the recommendations of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, then: Approve the delegation of authority to the Board of Commissioners in determining the salary, honorarium, and other allowances for members of the Board of Commissioners for the 2025 financial year. Approve not to appoint a replacement for the position of Commercial Director who was left, and thus the position will not be filled for the time being. 3. UMUM (Lanjutan) 1. GENERAL (Continued) c. Entitas Anak (Lanjutan) c. Subsidiaries (Continued) Pendirian Entitas Anak (Lanjutan) Establishment of the Subsidiaries (Continued) FGH (Lanjutan) FGH (Continued) Berdasarkan Akta Notaris No. 25 tanggal 16 Februari Based on Notarial Deed No. 25 dated February 16, 2023 dari Janty Lega, S.H., M.Kn., para pemegang 2023, made before Janty Lega, S.H., M.Kn., the saham menyetujui peningkatan Modal Dasar shareholders approved the increase of FGH's FGH dari semula Rp 1.000.000.000 menjadi Authorized Capital from originally Rp 1,000,000,000 Rp 50.000.000.000. Di samping itu, disetujui pula to Rp 50,000,000,000. In addition, the increase of peningkatan Modal Ditempatkan dan Disetor dari Issued and Paid-up Capital from Rp 250,000,000 to Rp 250.000.000 menjadi Rp 27.250.000.000, yang Rp 27,250,000,000 was also approved, which was seluruhnya diambil oleh Perusahaan, yang terdiri dari wholly subscribed by the Company, consisting of the pengeluaran saham dalam simpanan sebanyak 7.500 issuance of 7,500 shares from portfolio amounted to lembar senilai Rp 750.000.000 dan penerbitan Rp 750,000,000 and the issuance of 262,500 new saham baru sebanyak 262.500 lembar senilai shares amounted to Rp 26,250,000,000. Such Rp 26.250.000.000. Peningkatan modal ditempatkan increase of issued and fully paid-up capital resulted dan disetor penuh tersebut menyebabkan perubahan in the change of the Company's ownership in FGH kepemilikan Perusahaan atas FGH dari 99,96% from 99.96% to 99.99%. The deed has obtained menjadi 99,99%. Akta tersebut telah memperoleh approval from the Minister of Law and Human Rights persetujuan dari Menteri Hukum dan Hak Asasi of the Republic of Indonesia through Decision Letter Manusia Republik Indonesia dengan Surat Keputusan
